---
title: '750'
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(tidyverse)
```
```{r}
citation("tidyverse")
```

```{r}
counts_data <- read.csv("gene_counts.tsv",
                        sep="\t", row.names=1)
head(counts_data)
```

```{r}
# Create sample info
colData <- data.frame(
  condition = factor(c(rep("normal",5), rep("mutant",5)))
)
rownames(colData) <- colnames(counts_data)

# Check they match - must say TRUE
all(colnames(counts_data) %in% rownames(colData))
all(colnames(counts_data) == rownames(colData))
```

```{r}
# Build DESeq2 object
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts_data,
                              colData = colData,
                              design = ~ condition)

# Filter low counts
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds)) >= 10
dds <- dds[keep,]

# Set normal as reference
dds$condition <- relevel(dds$condition, ref = "normal")

# Run DESeq2
dds <- DESeq(dds)
res <- results(dds)
res <- res[order(res$padj),]
summary(res)
```
```{r}
# Save all results
res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
write.csv(res_df,
  "DESeq2_results.csv")
# Save significant DEGs only
sig <- subset(res_df, padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) > 1)
write.csv(sig,
  "significant_DEGs.csv")
```
```{r}
# Plots (save these for your report)
vsd <- vst(dds, blind=FALSE)
plotPCA(vsd, intgroup="condition")   
plotMA(res, ylim=c(-5,5))            
```
```{r}
# Load bound genes
bound_genes <- read.table(
  "bound_gene_ids.txt",
  header=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
bound_genes$V1 <- gsub("ID=", "", bound_genes$V1)
```
```{r}
# Get your significant DEG names
sig_gene_names <- rownames(sig)

# Find overlap
overlap <- intersect(sig_gene_names, bound_genes$V1)
cat("Number of genes bound AND differentially expressed:", 
    length(overlap), "\n")

# Save overlap list
write.csv(data.frame(gene=overlap),
  "bound_and_DE_genes.csv")
```
```{r}
# PCA Plot - save as PNG
png("PCA_plot.png", 
    width=800, height=600)
vsd <- vst(dds, blind=FALSE)
plotPCA(vsd, intgroup="condition")
dev.off()

# MA Plot - save as PNG
png("MA_plot.png",
    width=800, height=600)
plotMA(res, ylim=c(-5,5),
       main="MA Plot - Mutant vs Normal")
dev.off()
```
